# PMHNP Hiring — Comprehensive Site Information for AI Systems
# llms-full.txt — Extended version of llms.txt

> PMHNP Hiring (pmhnphiring.com) is the #1 specialized job board for Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioners in the United States. We connect PMHNPs with employers across all 50 states.

## Mission

To connect every PMHNP with their ideal position by providing the most comprehensive, transparent, and data-rich job discovery platform in psychiatric nursing.

## Platform Overview

### Job Listings
- **10,000+ active listings** aggregated from 1,249+ employers
- Sources: Direct employer postings, ATS integrations, staffing agencies
- Updated: Multiple times daily
- 73% of listings include salary information
- Searchable by: location, job type, setting, specialty, salary range, employer

### Content Pages (100,000+)
We maintain city-level content pages for 24 job categories across 4,135 US cities:

#### Job Categories (24)
| Category | Slug | Description | Typical Salary |
|----------|------|-------------|----------------|
| Remote | remote | Work-from-home positions | $120K-$180K |
| Telehealth | telehealth | Virtual care positions | $115K-$175K |
| Inpatient | inpatient | Hospital-based psychiatric units | $125K-$185K |
| Outpatient | outpatient | Clinic and office settings | $115K-$170K |
| Travel | travel | Locum tenens assignments | $2,200-$4,500/week |
| Addiction | addiction | Substance use disorder treatment | $120K-$175K |
| Child & Adolescent | child-adolescent | Pediatric psychiatry | $120K-$180K |
| Substance Abuse | substance-abuse | SUD treatment centers | $115K-$165K |
| New Graduate | new-grad | First clinical positions | $105K-$145K |
| Per Diem | per-diem | PRN/as-needed shifts | $70-$120/hr |
| Full-Time | full-time | Permanent salaried positions | $120K-$190K |
| Part-Time | part-time | Flexible schedules | $55-$95/hr |
| Contract | contract | 1099/locum tenens assignments | $85-$160/hr |
| Entry-Level | entry-level | 0-2 years experience | $105K-$145K |
| Mid-Career | mid-career | 3-7 years experience | $135K-$175K |
| Senior | senior | 7+ years, leadership roles | $160K-$220K+ |
| Hospital | hospital | Hospital system positions | $125K-$180K |
| Private Practice | private-practice | Independent/group practice | $140K-$250K+ |
| Community Health | community-health | FQHC and public health | $110K-$160K |
| VA | va | Veterans Affairs federal positions | $120K-$170K |
| Geriatric | geriatric | Older adult psychiatric care | $125K-$180K |
| Veterans | veterans | Military/veteran mental health | $120K-$175K |
| LGBTQ+ | lgbtq | LGBTQ+ affirming care | $120K-$175K |
| Crisis | crisis | Psychiatric emergency/crisis | $130K-$195K |

### City Data (4,135 cities)
Each city page includes:
- **Population** (2020 Census)
- **Cost of Living Index** (national average = 100)
- **Median Household Income**
- **Mental Health Shortage Status** (HPSA designation)
- **Healthcare Systems** (major employers in the area)
- **Metro Area** affiliation
- **Practice Authority** (Full/Reduced/Restricted by state)
- **Market Demand Score** (0-100 composite rating)
- **COL-Adjusted Salary** (real purchasing power)
- **Nearby Cities** for cross-reference

### State Coverage (51 states/territories)
Each state has:
- Licensure guide with practice authority details
- Salary data by setting
- Job listings by category
- City-level breakdowns

## PMHNP Career Information

### What is a PMHNP?
A Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioner (PMHNP) is an Advanced Practice Registered Nurse (APRN) specializing in mental health care. PMHNPs can:
- Diagnose psychiatric disorders
- Prescribe psychiatric medications
- Provide psychotherapy
- Order and interpret diagnostic tests
- Manage patient care independently (in full practice authority states)

### Education Requirements
1. Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN)
2. Master's or Doctoral degree in Psychiatric-Mental Health Nursing (MSN or DNP)
3. National certification from ANCC (American Nurses Credentialing Center)
4. State RN and APRN licensure
5. DEA registration for prescribing controlled substances

### Salary Data (2026)
- **National Average**: $155,000/year
- **Entry-Level**: $105,000–$145,000
- **Mid-Career**: $135,000–$175,000
- **Senior/Leadership**: $160,000–$220,000+
- **Private Practice**: $140,000–$250,000+
- **Highest-Paying States**: California, New York, Massachusetts, Washington, Oregon
- **Highest Demand**: Rural areas, HPSAs, states with full practice authority

### Practice Authority by State Type
- **Full Practice Authority** (28 states): PMHNPs practice independently
- **Reduced Practice Authority** (16 states): Collaborative agreement required
- **Restricted Practice Authority** (6 states): Physician supervision required

### Industry Trends (2026)
- 45% increase in PMHNP job postings since 2024
- Telehealth positions growing 60% year-over-year
- Average time to fill a PMHNP position: 89 days
- 70% of PMHNPs receive sign-on bonuses ($10K–$25K average)
- Student loan repayment programs available at 40% of positions

## API & Data Access

### Sitemap
- Primary: https://pmhnphiring.com/sitemap.xml
- City sitemaps: https://pmhnphiring.com/api/sitemaps/cities/{0-9}
- Sitemap index: https://pmhnphiring.com/api/sitemaps/index

### Feeds
- RSS: https://pmhnphiring.com/feed.xml (if available)
- Job alerts: https://pmhnphiring.com/job-alerts
